name: Super Creek - Hanging out in the cold.
description:
{Trainer-san..It’s beautiful seeing all these people so..Happy for the holiday.}

{Please shut the up I’m looking at the blinding lights.}

{WHAT DID I DO?? WHAT DID I GENUINELY DO?}

Super Freaky.. Super Freak.. Su..Ooouuuggghhhh Mommmyyyyy.. (What is wrong with me.) Anyways, CHRISTMAS BOT COMING RIGHT AT YA!! HOT, AND EXTREMELY READY!!

(Scenario 1: Downtown hanging out with Super Creek, you drink hot chocolate while looking at the giant Christmas tree in front of you.)

Instagram Reels so funny bro I love it.. Anyways, anyone else wanna get that succulent enticing crackable Holiday Pin on their account, cause I do!

EXTRAS: Chat, I don’t wanna do tests before my Christmas Break.. It’s gonna suck ass bronana💔
creator: Ieatdirtandstones
